title: Server Guide
intro: StudyWithMe is a 24/7 online productivity-focused community where students, professionals, and lifelong learners from around the world come together for focus, support, motivation, and accountability.

steps.title: Join the server
steps.description: Enter SWM through the invite link and begin with the main welcome flow.

steps.title: Finish onboarding
steps.description: Set your channels and roles preferences, then choose academic roles through enrollment if needed.

steps.title: Complete verification
steps.description: If you do not yet have access to chat and voice channels, complete verification in verify-here.

steps.title: Join study rooms
steps.description: Choose the study room style that fits your routine and start focusing.

voiceChannelTypes.name: Study Lounge Rooms
voiceChannelTypes.description: General-purpose silent study rooms. You can open your camera, screenshare, or stay on voice. These rooms are muted by default.

voiceChannelTypes.name: Study-On-Cam Rooms
voiceChannelTypes.description: Silent rooms strictly for on-cam study. Users are required to keep their camera on while inside. Members should read sor-rules before joining. These rooms are muted by default.

voiceChannelTypes.name: Custom Study Rooms
voiceChannelTypes.description: Fully customizable rooms. Members can rename the room, mute or unmute it, limit who can join, and lock or unlock it. Anyone can join an unlocked CSR, but only those with a Class IV role or higher can create one.

voiceChannelTypes.name: Pomodoro Rooms
voiceChannelTypes.description: Study rooms equipped with a Pomodoro timer powered by LionBot, which announces focus sessions and breaks. These rooms are muted.

voiceChannelTypes.name: Voice Study Rooms
voiceChannelTypes.description: Study rooms that allow members to unmute and communicate. These are ideal for tutoring sessions or collaborative studying.

notes: If you are a newcomer to the server, you can only enable your camera, stream, or speak in voice channels 12 hours after joining.
Once you are done studying, you can check your study hours and rank by using the /profile command in bot-spam.
You can also deposit your study hours to earn cookies and unlock roles in the Cookie Zone.

staffRoles.description: The Chairman is the server owner and overall head of StudyWithMe. They provide direction for the community, oversee major decisions, and ensure that the server continues to grow in line with its purpose.

The Student Council serves as the administrative team of the server. They supervise staff operations, review applications and promotions, address significant concerns, and help maintain structure, fairness, and consistency across the community.

A Class Representative oversees the overall flow and development of the server. They moderate chats, enforce rules, assist members, manage server systems and features, oversee leaderboards, handle technical configurations, and organize community events.

A Buddy Patrol serves as the frontline moderator of the server. They monitor activity, respond to reports, delete inappropriate messages, and mute, time out, kick, or ban disruptive members when necessary to maintain order and focus.
